step_rationale: Atherogenic lipoprotein particle cargo; retained in subendothelium; oxidation substrate.
mechanism: Remnant lipoproteins accumulate in the arterial intima and undergo oxidative modification, initiating atherosclerotic plaque formation.

Association of low-grade inflammation and elevated remnant cholesterol with risk of ASCVD and mortality in impaired renal function.
